questionHtml:
Which is correct for the reaction?

2Al (s) + 6HCl (aq) → 2AlCl3 (aq) + 3H2 (g)         ΔH = −1049 kJ

A. Reactants are less stable than products and the reaction is endothermic.

B. Reactants are more stable than products and the reaction is endothermic.

C. Reactants are more stable than products and the reaction is exothermic.

D. Reactants are less stable than products and the reaction is exothermic.

meta.title: Which is correct for the reaction? 2Al (s) + 6HCl (aq) → 2AlCl3 (aq) + 3H2 (g) ΔH = −1049 kJ A. Reactants are less stable than products and the reaction is endothermic. B. Reactant
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.1.3—The relative stability of reactants and products determines whether reactions are endothermic or exothermic. Sketch and interpret energy profiles for endothermic and exothermic reactions.
